headlines.headline: Why Stephen A. calls Draymond's comments about Steve Kerr 'foul'
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith details why Draymond Green’s comments that Steve Kerr hindered his career are uncalled for.

headlines.headline: John Wall becomes Howard's president of basketball operations
headlines.description: Five-time NBA All-Star John Wall has become the president of basketball operations at Howard University, returning to Washington to partner with the top-ranked HBCU in the country, school officials told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Sources: Rockets' Kevin Durant will miss Game 6 vs. Lakers
headlines.description: Kevin Durant will not play in Game 6 against the Lakers because of the ankle injury that has sidelined the Rockets star for most of Houston's first-round playoff series, sources told ESPN.

headlines.headline: Wednesday's best plays from the NBA playoffs

headlines.headline: Source: Calais Campbell reuniting with Ravens for 19th season
headlines.description: Veteran defensive end Calais Campbell, who played with the Ravens from 2020 to 2022, is returning to sign a one-year deal with Baltimore, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

headlines.headline: Bengals decline DE Myles Murphy's fifth-year option, source says
headlines.description: The Bengals are not picking up the fifth-year option for defensive end Myles Murphy, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

headlines.headline: Sources: Giants WR Darius Slayton has core-muscle surgery
headlines.description: Giants wide receiver Darius Slayton had surgery for a core-muscle injury recently and is expected to be sidelined throughout the Giants' offseason program this spring, sources told NFL Network.

headlines.headline: Darlington: Deshaun Watson deal is 'worst contract and transaction' in sports history
headlines.description: The "Get Up" crew discusses whether starting Deshaun Watson would be a mistake for the Browns.

headlines.headline: Why Jordan Reid has Arch Manning No. 1 in his 2027 NFL mock draft
headlines.description: ESPN NFL draft analyst Jordan Reid joins "Unsportsmanlike" to break down his 2027 NFL mock draft.

headlines.headline: 2027 NFL mock draft: Reid's early first-round predictions
headlines.description: We're still a full year out, but let's make way-too-early predictions for every first-round pick of the 2027 NFL draft. Will Arch Manning go No. 1? Jeremiah Smith?

headlines.headline: The NHL's best plays from a wild Wednesday

headlines.headline: Texier breaks 3rd-period tie, Canadiens beat Lightning 3-2 in Game 5 to take series lead
headlines.description: — Alexandre Texier broke a tie 1:06 into the third period and the Montreal Canadiens beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Wednesday night to take a 3-2 lead in the first-round series.
